'''Vactooine''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its dense [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] made it a suitable habitat for the [[Elix]].

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], a scientist lost an incredibly valuable anode no bigger than a grain of sand somewhere in Vactooine's desert.<ref name="A Grain of Sand">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Treasure Hunting|A Grain of Sand}}</ref>

In [[2560 BBY]], records showed that the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] invaded the colony, but were driven out by the natives there. Some said that it was destroyed by the Sith, since the whole colony disappeared somehow. It was also said that it was destroyed in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], but this had never been confirmed.

The planet was the location of the [[Battle of Vactooine]].
